name: Abhishek Das

organization.name: Yutori
organization.description: Building AI agents that browse and act on the web for you, autonomously.

bio: Co-CEO and Co-Founder of Yutori, building AI agents that browse and act on the web for you. During his PhD at Georgia Tech (2016-2020), he did some of the earliest work on agents that can see, talk, and act, and co-developed Grad-CAM, a widely used method for interpreting neural networks. He was later a Research Scientist at FAIR (Meta), where he helped start the Open Catalyst Project to accelerate electrocatalyst discovery.
